indicators.name: unobstructed floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for a yoga mat to be placed without obstructions.

indicators.name: soft lighting
indicators.rationale: Soft lighting creates a calming atmosphere suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: The minimal furniture arrangement allows for a clear space for yoga practice.

indicators.name: couches and seating
indicators.rationale: Couches and seating are present but not conducive to yoga practice.

indicators.name: coffee tables
indicators.rationale: Coffee tables are not suitable for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The scene is moderately suitable for yoga practice. While there is unobstructed floor space and soft lighting, the presence of couches and coffee tables makes it less ideal for yoga. A score of 4 reflects the mixed suitability of the space for yoga.
